reviews.comment:
HOY DOMINGO SIENDO LAS 21-17 HACE FACIL MAS DE MEDIA HORA QUE ESTOY ESPERANDO PARA CARGAR NAFTA Y ESTANDO DOS PLAYEROS UNA VERGUENZA QUE TARDEN TANTO EN CARGAR

reviews.comment:
No le pongo 0 estrellas porq tengo q dejar una para poder opinar... una porquería los baños siempre cerrados apenas estacionas viene un tipo a interrogarte como si vas a robar... pesimo

(Translated by Google)
I'm not giving it 0 stars because I have to leave one to be able to review it... it's awful. The bathrooms are always closed, and as soon as you park, some guy comes up to interrogate you as if you're going to steal... terrible.

reviews.comment:
Gente como PUPI da gusto que te atienda! Cansado y todo le pone el Pecho. Tomen personal que los pibes trabajan a 2 manos y terminan filtrados!

(Translated by Google)
People like Pupi are a pleasure to work with! Even tired, he gives it his all. Hire staff, because these kids are working themselves to the bone and getting filtered out!
